project_type: React 18 SPA with Vite 6, Tailwind CSS, Firebase backend
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify no compilation errors. Manual functional testing required.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification limited to successful build and code review.
contribution_requirements: Create a new branch from main for the fix. PR against main on tinkergourav-cmd/ClearMind.
key_patterns: isPreviewMode guard pattern: `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the top of mutation functions. All auto-save effects already early-return in Preview Mode. UI elements hidden with `{!isPreviewMode && (...)}` conditional rendering.
relevant_files: src/App.jsx - main component (7308 lines), contains appMode state, all canvas interaction handlers, mutation functions
src/CardEditorPanel.jsx - card editing panel (already has guards)
src/FullTaskManager.jsx - task management panel (already has guards)
src/PinPanel.jsx - pin panel (partially guarded via UI hiding)
directory_structure: src/ contains all source files. Single-page app with App.jsx as the monolithic component (~7308 lines). Sub-panels are separate components that receive isPreviewMode as a prop.
